title: Hollyone 14cm Red Glass Vase for Flowers, Modern Decorative Centerpiece for Home Decor
features: 【Multi-Purpose】 The vase boasts a generous size, with a height of 5.5inches/14cm and an opening width of 4inches/10cm. Hollyone flower vases can accommodate various types of flowers or green plants, instantly brightening and warming up your home.

【Exquisite Glass】 This Hollyone glass vase is meticulously crafted from high-quality glass, featuring a cylindrical shape. Both the sides and the bottom of the vase have been thickened to ensure its durability. Each groove and contour has been carefully designed, making this vase a piece of functional art that complements any décor.

【Perfect Decoration】 This flower vase is ideal for enhancing the ambiance in your living room, dining room, shop, party, bathroom, office, restaurant, bedroom, wedding, autumn decorations, and birthday celebrations. It adds an elegant and romantic touch to any space and is suitable for everyday use. Whether you place it as a standalone centerpiece or adorn it with your favorite flowers, the artistic texture of our glass vase will draw admiring glances

【Great Gift Idea】 As you run your fingers along the vase's surface, you can feel the subtle undulations, each one creating a mesmerizing interplay of light and shadow. These unique, uneven patterns make every Hollyone glass vase evoke a sense of timeless elegance, adding a touch of sophistication and intrigue to your space. The 5.5-inch/14cm thickened glass vase comes packaged in durable cardboard, making it an excellent gift for family, friends, colleagues, or neighbors.

【Service Guaranteed】 If you have any questions about quality protection and refunds for our decorative glass vase for flowers, please feel free to contact us through the Amazon message center. We strive to make your shopping experience as pleasant as possible.
